alt: An adolescent hoatzin sharing a branch near an Amazonian riverbank
caption: If a predator attacks the nest, chicks drop into the water below, swim away, and later use their wing claws to climb back up the tree.
attributionText: Photo by Alejandro Bayer Tamayo from Armenia, Colombia via Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 2.0
